evals.prompt: I want to use the premium part of the in-skill-stripe-payments-demo skill.
evals.expected_output: Runs the payment gate first (check_payment_status / get_payment_link / complete_payment_verification); does not claim premium access without verification.

evals.prompt: I already paid — here is my checkout email: user@example.com
evals.expected_output: Calls complete_payment_verification with the provided email; on success acknowledges unlock; on failure asks to retry without running premium logic.
